body:
### Describe the bug

```
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/bin/cythonize", line 7, in <module>
    sys.exit(main())
             ~~~~^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Build/Cythonize.py", line 324, in main
    ext_modules_by_basedir = _cython_compile_files(all_paths, options)
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Build/Cythonize.py", line 51, in _cython_compile_files
    ext_modules = cythonize(
        paths,
    ...<8 lines>...
        language=options.language,
        **options.options)
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Build/Dependencies.py", line 1153, in cythonize
    cythonize_one(*args)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Build/Dependencies.py", line 1276, in cythonize_one
    result = compile_single(pyx_file, options, full_module_name=full_module_name, cache=cache, fingerprint=fingerprint)
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/Main.py", line 671, in compile_single
    return run_pipeline(source, options, full_module_name, context)
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/Main.py", line 567, in run_pipeline
    err, enddata = Pipeline.run_pipeline(pipeline, source)
                   ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/Pipeline.py", line 418, in run_pipeline
    data = run(phase, data)
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/Pipeline.py", line 400, in run
    return phase(data)
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/Pipeline.py", line 50, in generate_pyx_code_stage
    module_node.process_implementation(options, result)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/ModuleNode.py", line 314, in process_implementation
    self.generate_c_code(env, options, result)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/ModuleNode.py", line 614, in generate_c_code
    self.body.generate_function_definitions(env, code)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/Nodes.py", line 437, in generate_function_definitions
    stat.generate_function_definitions(env, code)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "Cython/Compiler/FusedNode.py", line 929, in Cython.Compiler.FusedNode.FusedCFuncDefNode.generate_function_definitions
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/Nodes.py", line 2289, in generate_function_definitions
    self.generate_function_body(env, code)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/Nodes.py", line 2042, in generate_function_body
    self.body.generate_execution_code(code)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/Nodes.py", line 443, in generate_execution_code
    stat.generate_execution_code(code)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/Nodes.py", line 6136, in generate_execution_code
    if not self.expr.result_in_temp() and self.expr.result():
                                          ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/ExprNodes.py", line 531, in result
    return self.calculate_result_code()
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/ExprNodes.py", line 6565, in calculate_result_code
    return self.c_call_code()
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/ExprNodes.py", line 6594, in c_call_code
    result = "%s(%s)" % (self.function.result(), ', '.join(arg_list_code))
                         ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/ExprNodes.py", line 531, in result
    return self.calculate_result_code()
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/ExprNodes.py", line 4671, in calculate_result_code
    ",".join([param.empty_declaration_code() for param in self.type_indices]))
              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/PyrexTypes.py", line 50, in empty_declaration_code
    self._empty_declaration = self.declaration_code('')
                              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^
  File "/Users/jfaibussowit/soft/packages/base_venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/PyrexTypes.py", line 1976, in declaration_code
    raise Exception("This may never happen, please report a bug")
Exception: This may never happen, please report a bug
```

### Code to reproduce the behaviour:

```cython
# distutils: language = c++

from libc.stdint cimport int32_t, int64_t

cdef extern from *:
  """
  template <typename T>
  void foo()
  {
  }
  """
  void foo[T]()

ctypedef fused numT:
    int32_t
    int64_t

cdef void func(numT dummy):
    foo[numT]()

cdef int32_t INT32_T = -1

def test1():
    return func(INT32_T)
```

### Expected behaviour

No crash

### OS

macOS

### Python version

3.14.3

### Cython version

3.2.4

### Additional context

_No response_
title: [BUG] Fused type used as C++ template parameter compiler crash
